description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests. The workflow has read permission to repository contents. It consists of two jobs: mypy and test. The mypy job runs on ubuntu-20.04, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs mypy, and runs it with strict mode on certifi. The test job runs on ubuntu-20.04 with a matrix strategy across multiple Python versions, checks out the code, sets up Python for each version, installs pytest, and runs tests with pytest.
